message:
feat: add StatusBar component with context pressure display

Adds StatusBar showing context tokens, pressure %, distance to compaction,
turn count, token usage (when running), model name, and session ID.
Wires App component to update StatusBar from context_update, plan_end,
session_start, session_end, and interrupted events. Includes tests for
both the StatusBar component and the App integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
